content.en:
Of course.

Even if Ye Tian could move and shuttle in a small area, there was no way to return to Wanlong's territorial waters from here, because he couldn't shuttle back to Wanlong's territorial waters in the opposite direction.

Unless, he finds the Territory Bead.

Ye Tian didn't care if he could return to Wanlong's territorial waters, his purpose was to find an opportunity in the gap in the territorial waters, so as to break through to the Blood Transformation Realm, this was his purpose.

......

Time flies.

this day.

Ye Tian was following the shock current to a place, and suddenly saw a creature with a wolf-like appearance walking in the ruins of the territorial waters.

Suddenly, Ye Tian met the other party's gaze.

"Not good!"

His face changed drastically.

This creature is definitely still a creature of the Blood Transformation Realm, and it is not a Blood Transformation Realm.

Even if he was far away, he could sense the terrifying aura on the other party's body, which was obviously much stronger than a Second Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor like the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor.

"It should be a three-blooded mutant realm creature!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Rumble!!!!

The first three Blood Transformation Realm creatures rushed over, obviously not coming well.

Abrupt.

The opponent launched an attack, and one claw directly tore through the shock flow of the territorial sea boundary gap, causing the surrounding void to freeze instantly.

"Ten golden arms!

"Extreme Technique!"

Ye Tian tried to fend off the opponent's attack.

However, it can't be stopped at all!

Click!

His position was directly shattered, the golden body of the ten arms was broken, and the pole technique only left a white mark on the opponent's claws.

After the blow, only a part of Ye Tian's body remained, although it had not yet fallen, it was almost like falling.

Then.

This three-blooded transformation realm creature swallowed Ye Tian's body in one gulp.

But Ye Tian's duplicate body was directly dissolved and turned into nothingness.

As a result, the other party swallowed nothing.

......

"The Blood Dragon Wolf of the Three Blood Transformation Realms!"

The name Blood Dragon Wolf is information that Ye Tian spied on with his copying talent.

This encounter with the blood dragon wolf is really a bit unlucky, but maybe it's a normal situation.

After all, the territorial sea boundary is an extremely dangerous place, and it is too normal to encounter powerful Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

"This replica body has fallen, so I continue to let a replica body enter the boundary gap of territorial waters. "

Soon.

Another copy of Ye Tian's body entered the territorial sea boundary gap from node six.

This time, though, he changed direction slightly.

The direction is a little worse, and the back is far away from that area.

A relatively long period of time has passed, and although Ye Tian has encountered some troubles during this period, he has not fallen.

this day.

He finally found a piece of shard.

Swish!

He jumped and shuttled a few times, landing on this piece of shard.

This fragmented land is very small, not as big as the Dark Sea Fragment and the True Dragon Realm Ruins, at most it is equivalent to a small world.

But for him, at least there is a place to stay.

"See if there's any treasure in this fragment?"

Ye Tian quickly searched, and in the blink of an eye, he searched for this fragment.

There are resources here too, but there are too few of them.

Most of them are relatively ordinary, except for one resource, which even he can't see.

"What the hell is this?"

Ye Tian looked at the drops of golden liquid in the palm of his hand, this substance contained extremely terrifying energy, but it was different from the resources he had seen before.

Obviously, this is a resource unique to the boundary seam of the territorial waters, and there is no such resource in the territorial waters of Wanlong.

"Copy one copy body first, let the other copy body try to refine this golden liquid and see the effect!"

It is also the quickest way to test resources.

Grunt!

Ye Tian swallowed a drop of golden liquid in one gulp, and then tried to refine it.

Rumble!!!!

Terrifying energy poured into Ye Tian's heart.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian instantly used the immeasurable supernatural power technique to quench his heart with this golden liquid energy.

Time passed slowly, and it was a long time before this drop of golden liquid was finally completely refined.

"This substance helps to temper the heart, that is to say, with the immeasurable divine light, coupled with a large amount of this golden liquid, the heart can be transformed, thus prompting the immeasurable blood of the whole body to complete a blood transformation!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Immediately, he continued to refine this drop of golden liquid.

After a while, all these golden liquids were refined by him.

"No more!"

Ye Tian sighed, such a little golden liquid is not enough, if there is a large amount of golden liquid, he will have the hope of impacting the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor Realm.

"There's this golden liquid here, maybe there's one nearby, look for it!"

A copy of Ye Tian's body began to move forward along the shock current.

It didn't take long for him to see another fragment.

In this fragment, more than a dozen drops of golden liquid were found.

Later, he found a number of fragments nearby, each with a few or dozens of drops of golden liquid, and some of them had nothing.

"These fragments should have been one piece, but they shattered apart and scattered across the area into small fragments. "

Ye Tian guessed.

this day.

When Ye Tian found a fragment, he encountered several Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

Whew!!

When these Blood Transformation Realm creatures saw Ye Tian, they immediately launched an attack.

Fortunately, these few Blood Transformation Realm creatures were only one Blood Transformation, so their strength was not strong, and they did not cause trouble to Ye Tian.

Soon, he got rid of these blood mutant creatures.

"These Blood Transformation Realm creatures are all Vajra Snake creatures, belonging to the same race, it seems that this is the territory of the Vajra Snake clan!"

At this moment, Ye Tian had an idea, that is, to see if he could find a Vajra Snake that fused into the realm, and after killing the other party, he would copy its body and blend into the Vajra Snake clan as a Vajra snake.

So in the following days, Ye Tian was looking for the Vajra Snake that fused into the realm.

However, he had encountered the Vajra Snake many times, but all of them were Vajra Snakes in the Blood Transformation Realm, and none of the Vajra Snakes in the Fusion Realm had been encountered.

Maybe it's because the Fusion Realm Vajra Snake is too weak, so it doesn't dare to leave the lair.

"The Vajra Snake Clan is too powerful, and there are already a lot of blood transformation realms I have encountered, and this force is enough to sweep across the entire Ten Thousand Dragons territorial waters. Ye Tian thought so.

After another period of time, he encountered good luck and encountered a Vajra snake in the Melting Body Realm.

This vajra snake was in a relatively large fragment and seemed to be cultivating.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian used the Extreme Technique and killed this King Kong snake with one blow.

Immediately, he collected the corpse of this King Kong snake at the peak of the Fusion Realm, and copied another King Kong snake at the peak of the Fusion Realm at the fastest speed.

"Perfect!"

Ye Tian sighed and quickly left here.
